Thank you for your interest in the Marketing Manager role at ABC Pvt Ltd. We would like to schedule a final interview with you.

Time: 10:30 AM 
Venue: 3rd Floor, Head Office, MG Road, Delhi 

Please confirm your availability by replying 'YES' or suggest an alternative time. 

Best regards, 
HR Team, ABC Pvt Ltd.
